full_text:
Wu Liang (Deshan) 五梁 (德山)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Liang (五梁), styledDeshan (德山), was born in Nan’an in Qianwei. Commended for classical learning and moral integrity. Wu Liang was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
